query:
ALTER TABLE claims
  ADD COLUMN panel_beater_choice_1 VARCHAR(36) NULL COMMENT 'FK: marketplace_profiles.id — first insurer-approved panel beater choice',
  ADD COLUMN panel_beater_choice_2 VARCHAR(36) NULL COMMENT 'FK: marketplace_profiles.id — second insurer-approved panel beater choice',
  ADD COLUMN panel_beater_choice_3 VARCHAR(36) NULL COMMENT 'FK: marketplace_profiles.id — third insurer-approved panel beater choice';
